description: Estimate a Two-Stage Least Squares (TSLS) regression using the 'mroz' dataset of working married women. The goal is to estimate the return to education on log wages ('lwage'), treating education ('educ') as endogenous and using parents' education ('mothereduc', 'fathereduc') as instruments. The model must include 'const', 'exper', and 'expersq' as exogenous regressors. Save the full model output to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/tsls_results.txt.
